title: NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their M.E/ M.Tech can use this chance and apply for the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of applciation. If...
